hero.quote: 'Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spectral Schematics: their 3s all-in loses N% of its bite, at the cost of ~27-29% of this kit's damage' still renders under 5 of 6 matchup rows (The Fey, Argus, Renna, Iggy & Scorch, Gideon)
hero.issue: round-1 swap-tip redundancy not resolved — the dedup only fires on byte-identical lines, and these differ only in the percentages, so the same swap advice repeats five times
